# Light energy is a form of energy

## Short Teaching Summary
Light energy is a form of energy: Light, like kinetic energy, can travel, change form, and be harnessed to do work. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
